event_info: back of a length delivery; hint of inward movement; Samson jams it onto the pads

Samson and CSK are away thanks to a wayward throw. Fullish delivery; Samson leans forward and drives it straight to cover-point. Rutherford lobs it towards de Kock and the ball goes over him; overthrow conceded. Bumrah asks Rutherford to calm down
full pitcher around off; Gaikwad walks down and pushes it to cover

1 run; ouch! 137ks well-directed short ball; keeps climbing and Gaikwad decides to take it on; the ball goes over his top-edge and pings him on the helmet. It lobs towards fine leg and the duo cross over
137.9ks back of a length delivery; no room on offer; Samson defends down the pitch

FOUR; lovely shot! Not much wrong with the delivery. Bumrah went a bit full searching for swing. The line is outside off; Samson leans forward and creams the drive past cover-point. Nothing Rutherford could do there. Hang on! Bumrah has overstepped. The siren goes off. Free-hit coming up..
the extra delivery does not cost anything. Bumrah nails the yorker and Samson can't do much about it; he's late in bringing his bat down and is pinned on the back pad

131.2ks good length ball outside off; bit of away swing and Gaikwad plays it with the movement; opens the bat face and drives square of the wicket. There's a deep backward point in place and Krish keeps it to a brace
shortens the length and keeps it close to off; Gaikwad defends it back to Hardik

FOUR; 129ks fraction short and does not bounce much; Gaikwad adjusts quickly and pulls it in front of square; beats mid-wicket and the ball races away. Now Hardik has overstepped. Second no-ball in two overs. Mumbai Indians need to be disciplined. Free-hit coming up..
tries to keep it away from Gaikwad's range and sprays it outside off; not within the marker and called a wide. The free-hit stays..
unlucky! Very full delivery; close to yorker length; Gaikwad opens the bat face and squeezes it off the outer half; splits slip and short third with precision

he got hit on the helmet off Bumrah; but has nailed the hook shot against Hardik. Well-directed short ball but Hardik does not have the pace like Bumrah; Gaikwad takes it on and sends it sailing over fine leg
133.3ks on a length and outside off; Gaikwad pushes it firmly and picks out extra cover
135ks good length ball on middle and leg; Gaikwad flicks to deep square leg and keeps strike
flatter delivery around off; Gaikwad knocks it to cover-point
ufff! What timing! Short of length and drifting in; Gaikwad clips it with the use of his bottom hand; just a flick of the wrists and the ball races through the mid-wicket region
96ks fullish delivery around off; Gaikwad works it towards mid-on
drifting down leg; Samson tucks it past square leg and settles with a single
92.1ks slower and hint of grip; Gaikwad pats it with soft hands towards backward point

ball_event: out Caught by Tilak Varma!! Ghazanfar strikes! Just what Mumbai Indians needed after a sloppy start. Gaikwad was looking good but he departs for another cheap score. This was the carrom ball
event_info: drifts in and lands around leg-stump; Gaikwad makes room and looks to loft inside out; does not quite get under it and mistimes it to long-off. Tilak runs to his right and gobbles it up with ease. Ruturaj Gaikwad c Tilak Varma b AM Ghazanfar 22(14) [4s-3 6s-1]
134.7ks fullish delivery on off; Samson eases it in front of mid-on
130.6ks good length ball on off; Samson defends it with a straight bat to mid-on
short and down leg; Samson stays inside the line and tries to help it along; the pull comes off the glove and the ball races away fine. The line was the problem there..
once again it is the line that is wrong. Full and angling into the pads; Samson does not need a second invitation; he brings his bottom hand into play and whips it into the deep square leg stand

through Bumrah. That's poor from the pacer. Back of a length outside off; Samson opens the bat face and steers it more off the outside-edge; goes to the right of short third and Bumrah dives over the ball

there's a discussion between Hardik; SKY and Tilak. It is not for a wide. They think there is a nick. De Kock is not interested. Slower bouncer; too short and too high; Samson attempts the ramp but does not connect. Called wide for height. The ball was close to the glove but UltraEdge shows a flat-line
another massive over. This is deft from Samson. Good length ball outside off; he opens the bat face and guides it behind square on the off-side. No deep backward point and the ball raced away
Sarfaraz opens his account with a superb shot. First ball against Bumrah and he lofts him down the ground. Fullish delivery on off; Sarfaraz needs no sighters and lofts the drive back over Bumrah
short of length around off; Sarfaraz stays rooted to the crease and guides it to third man
121.6ks slower short ball and Samson takes it on. He does not quite middle the pull but gets enough for the ball to land beyond the rope. The boundaries are flowing for CSK now..
141.5ks shortens the length; Samson back cuts behind square and third man tidies up
141.1ks speared into the blockhole; Sarfaraz brings his bat down and jams it out
138.6ks another yorker on leg; Sarfaraz toe-ends it down to fine leg

he loves to sweep and does not waste any time to play that shot. 77.2ks flighted delivery; Sarfaraz sits down and sweeps it in front of square. The fielders are at deep square and long-on; so he knew where the gap was and hit it right there
shot! Santner shortens the length and Sarfaraz is quick to pounce; he rocks back and pulls it to the vacant deep mid-wicket region; one bounce and over the ropes
slower and outside off; Sarfaraz guides it to short third

ball_event: out Bowled!! Cleaned up! Santner wins this battle and he's pumped. Sarfaraz loves the sweep but that also brings about his downfall. This is much slower from Santner - 75.2ks tossed up
event_info: but the length was held back; it was not there for the sweep; Sarfaraz was through the shot and the ball went past him to hit the top of the stumps. Sarfaraz Khan b Mitchell Santner 14(8) [4s-3]
Santner does a Krunal. 109.1ks short ball outside off; Dube was a bit surprised but manages to get the pull away; wide of deep mid-wicket and the pair settle with a single
90.7ks quicker and drifting in; Samson pushes it back to Santner
95.7ks off-break around off; Dube prods forward and blocks it back
91.8ks drifting across the left-hander; Dube works it through mid-wicket
just over Dhir. 101.7ks short and sits up nicely for Samson; he rocks back and pulls it towards deep mid-wicket. Not quite off the meat but enough to evade a leaping Dhir
88.7ks flatter and sliding in; Samson eases it to long-on
94.9ks fullish delivery around off; Dube pushes it wide of long-off
89.8ks carrom ball outside off; Samson leans across and eases it to sweeper cover
111ks starts with a slower ball; Samson reaches outside off and slaps it towards sweeper cover
134.1ks back of a length delivery; not there for the pull but Dube goes for it; jams it off the under-edge onto the back thigh
131.7ks full and attacking the stumps; Dube flicks to deep square leg

nicely done! 126.8ks fullish delivery on the pads; easy pickings for Samson and he does not miss out; clips it backward of square and beats short fine comfortably. He's getting the boundaries for CSK..
114.3ks off-pace short of length delivery; Samson guides it behind square and they settle with a single
117.2ks slower ball on off; Dube toe-ends the pull to square leg

ball_event: out Bowled!! Knocked 'im! This is a massive moment in the game. Dube was supposed to take on Ghazanfar and Santner. But he falls to the Afghanistan spinner. This is the carrom ball
event_info: bowled from round the wicket and keeps drifting in with the arm; Dube sees the fullish length and looks to go down the ground; the ball beats the inside-edge and hits the top of off-stump. Ghazanfar is delighted and why won't he be. He's got two wickets and has been superb today. Shivam Dube b AM Ghazanfar 5(8)
97.2ks fullish delivery; Brevis moves around and drives with his weight on the back foot; places it square on the off-side
89.5ks sliding into the pads; Samson tucks it backward of square leg
91.3ks another leg-lined delivery; Brevis works it round the corner - square leg
too straight - on middle and leg; Samson nurdles it backward of square
101.7ks quicker and flatter; Brevis stays back and slices it square on the off-side

Brevis will play his shots. First ball against Santner and he pumps it straight down the ground. This was overpitched and Brevis lofts it back over Santner. He gets enough for the ball to travel 80 meters
uhhh! That was a tight call. Santner saw Brevis back away and floated it up outside off; the ball was on the tramline and the umpire signals a wide
short and outside off; Brevis cracks it in front of square and the sweeper tidies up
80.2ks flighted outside off; Samson chops it to sweeper cover
moves away and Santner almost lands it around yorker length; Brevis swings hard and jams it onto the pad; the ball rolls back to Santner
second six in the over. 76.2ks floated up outside off; Santner makes him reach for the big shot and Brevis obliges; he gets it off the meat and sends it sailing over long-off. 87 meters..
once again Brevis moves away and Santner slips in a floaty delivery outside off; Brevis lets it go thinking it is a wide. But replays show that some part of the ball was within the guideline
in the air; but safe! Cuts it on the bounce towards Santner who gets his hands to it. Landed just in front of him
short ball by Ashwani Kumar; Dewald Brevis goes for a pull and it lands just in front of deep mid-wicket

Sanju Samson brings up his fifty! A low full toss outside off; Sanju Samson reaches out for it with a slice and finds the boundary at deep backward point. Gets a standing ovation from the crowd and his teammates in the dugout. Proving to be a crucial knock from the CSK opener
yorker length ball on middle and leg; Sanju Samson squeezes it through mid-wicket
short and punished! Rocks back in the crease and puts this away to the deep backward square leg for a boundary. The umpire stationed there got out of its way just in time

ball_event: out Caught by Jasprit Bumrah!! Ashwani Kumar gets the dangerous batsman. A short ball outside off
event_info: Dewald Brevis goes for the upper cut; but doesn't get the timing right. Straight to Bumrah in the deep and CSK are four down. Ashwani Kumar was proving to be expensive; but this wicket will give him a lot of relief. All the players charge towards the bowler to celebrate the wicket as they executed the plan. Dewald Brevis c Jasprit Bumrah b Ashwani Kumar 21(11) [4s-1 6s-2]
pushed through covers by Sanju Samson for a single
flatter through the air outside off; knocked into the pocket at cover for a single
fraction short on off; punched to long-off for one
fired down the leg-side and it's a wide ball
eased to long-off by Kartik Sharma for a single
clipped through the on-side by Sanju Samson for a single. That clipped the inside edge
a lot slower through the air on off; pushed into the off-side
rides the bounce and runs it down to third man
short of a length outside off; Kartik Sharma attempts a cut and gets beaten. The ball skids along the deck; he was probably a little late in playing that shot
similar to the previous ball. Back of a length outside off; Kartik Sharma attempts a cut and misses
pulled through mid-wicket as the bowler goes short
slower bouncer outside off; Sanju Samson lets it through to the keeper. The batter was expecting a wide ball; but the umpire isn't interested. Reckons it's legitimate delivery
Ashwani Kumar goes short and Sanju Samson has pulled this through mid-wicket for a single
touch fuller on off; Sanju Samson push-drives it to long-off
Kartik Sharma has a smile on his face as he launches this into the stands. Advances down the wicket and lofts it cleanly over wide long-off for a clean six
fraction short outside off; Kartik Sharma steers it towards point
quicker through the air; doesn't turn much; Kartik Sharma stays put and knocks it back to the bowler
another maximum! A loopy delivery outside off; was a widish delivery; Kartik Sharma reaches out for it with a lofted drive and clears wide long-off. He's dealing in sixes in this over
flatter through the air on middle and leg; knocked to long-on by Kartik Sharma
played along the carpet to long-on by Kartik Sharma
eased to long-on by Sanju Samson
nudged into the pocket at mid-wicket for one
short and wide outside off; Sanju Samson slaps this through cover-point for one
way too full on the stumps; Kartik Sharma squeezes it down the pitch
pushed through on a good length; Kartik Sharma looks to nudge it away; gets hit on the pads. End of a terrific spell by Ghazanfar
high full toss around off; Sanju Samson hops a touch and slices it towards short third man. Was just below the waist
slower one goes the distance. Picks the bones out of this slower one; dispatching it over long-on for a towering six. Not a great delivery by the young pacer

that's the class of Samson. Smoked a slower one over long-on on the last ball. Now he has scored a boundary against a yorker. This was a well-executed delivery; right into the blockhole and Sanju Samson plays it really well. Squeezes it past the fielder at short third man

easy pickings! Full toss on the pads; Sanju Samson glances it away to the fine leg fence. Krish Bhagat proving to be expensive. Introduced so late in the innings and his inexperience is clearly getting exposed
slower short ball on leg; Sanju Samson pulls it towards short fine leg
15 runs from that over. On the shorter side outside off; Sanju Samson runs it down to third man
137.9ks low full toss around off; Samson opens the bat face and drives square of the wicket
141.3ks nails the yorker; Kartik digs it back to Bumrah
yorker length ball around off; Kartik Sharma digs it back to the bowler
a full toss around off; Kartik Sharma goes for a drive; but doesn't middle it; straight to the fielder at cover

ball_event: out Caught by Mitchell Santner!! End of a rusty knock by Kartik Sharma. He smashed a couple of clean sixes against Santner
event_info: but apart from those two blows; a pretty mediocre knock by the young batter. This was a full toss and Kartik Sharma whipped it towards deep square leg. Santner stationed there dives forward and completes a good low catch. He injured his shoulder as he put in a dive. The MI owner looks concerned as he checks on him near the dugout. Kartik Sharma c Mitchell Santner b Jasprit Bumrah 18(19) [6s-2]
squeezed into the off-side by Jamie Overton for a single. What a fantastic over that was. Hardly conceded any runs it
that was a wide full toss outside off; Jamie Overton reaches out for it and squeezes it towards third man for a boundary
slower bouncer attempted; but it was way too wide

just clears the infield. This was pitched up by the bowler and Jamie Overton chips it over extra cover. That's the second boundary of the over. Apart from Bumrah; CSK can target the other bowlers. That can help them get past the 210-run mark
slower short ball outside off; Jamie Overton has a swing and a miss
similar to the previous delivery; slower bouncer; Jamie Overton goes for a pull and misses
tonked down the ground. Ashwani Kumar goes full and Jamie Overton has launched this right over the bowler's head for half-a-dozen

ball_event: out Caught by Naman Dhir!! End of Jamie Overton's cameo. Ashwani Kumar finishes off his spell with a wicket. This was full and quick outside off
event_info: Jamie Overton plays a lofted drive; but this flies straight to the fielder at deep point. Naman Dhir charges in from the boundary and takes a sharp catch. The DJ and the Mumbai supporters like it. Jamie Overton c Naman Dhir b Ashwani Kumar 15(7) [4s-2 6s-1]
fired at the toes; a low full toss as Sanju Samson flicks it to deep mid-wicket
yorker length ball that dips in front of the batter; Akeal Hosein squeezes it into the on-side
flicked through the leg-side for a single by Sanju Samson
squeezed towards long-on for a single
fired down the leg-side by Jasprit Bumrah; but it's a no ball as well. Free-hit coming up!
cheeky! A low full toss on leg; Sanju Samson shuffles across and scoops it towards fine leg. Almost goes the distance
Sanju Samson will retain strike for the last over. He needs 15 runs to reach his century. Can he get there?

smoked into the stands! Sanju Samson moves into the 90s. Latches onto the short ball and pummels it over deep mid-wicket for a clean six. Hosein walks upto him and appreciates him. Needs only 9 more to get to his second century of IPL 2026
short and quick outside off; shapes back in sharply as Sanju Samson slashes at it; getting beaten on the inside edge. Good pace
denies a single. This was full and quick around off; Sanju Samson swings hard; mistimes it towards long-on
200 up for CSK - Samson inches closer to the magical three-digit mark. This was full and wide outside off; Sanju Samson reaches out for it and lofts it over deep extra cover for half-a-dozen more
full toss on leg; Sanju Samson swings hard; gets an inside edge towards short fine leg

century no. 2 of the season for Sanju Samson! What a finish. A short ball on middle and leg; Sanju Samson picks the length early and pulls it towards deep square leg. Hits the cushions on the bounce and that's a perfect end to the innings. Samson takes off his helmet to celebrate the milestone. He gets a standing ovation from the CSK supporters and his teammates in the dugout welcome him back with a standing ovation too. Fleming gives him a hug and pats his back in the dressing room
fuller and drifted across; de Kock slices the drive to extra cover
de Kock gets off the mark with a six. This is quicker; flatter and around leg; de Kock sits down and sweeps it backward of square. He gets enough for the ball to land beyond the rope
fuller and sliding across; de Kock drives and picks out mid-off
89.8ks slower but skidding across; de Kock opens the bat face and guides it to backward point
94.1ks fraction short and outside off; de Kock chops it to cover-point and quickly crosses over

ball_event: out Caught by Sanju Samson!! Gone! Akeal Hosein strikes in the first over. Malewar does not make an impact. That's two consecutive games that he has failed. More flight
event_info: the length is full and Malewar is drawn into the forward press; he pushes in front of his body and the ball spins away a bit; kisses the outside-edge and Samson makes no mistake behind the stumps. Danish Malewar c Sanju Samson b Akeal Hosein 0(1)
full pitcher on off; de Kock pushes it firmly to mid-off
138.9ks short of length around off; de Kock rides the bounce and steers it to short third
137.9ks touch fuller and hint of away swing; de Kock drives with the movement and finds backward point
139.7ks short of length outside off; de Kock gets on top and guides it to backward point

ball_event: out Bowled!! Dragged on! This is turning into a perfect start for Chennai Super Kings. This has been such a good over. 138.9ks good length ball
event_info: swings away outside off; de Kock reaches for the drive and didn't account for the movement; plays outside the line and the inside-edge crashes into the stumps. The Super Kings are pumped and the energy is visible in the field. Quinton de Kock b Mukesh Choudhary 7(10) [6s-1]

Suryakumar is up and running. That would have been a good ball for a left-hander; not for a right-hander. 141.1ks full delivery on the pads; picked nonchalantly and flicked uppishly in front of square. Suryakumar does not bother to run
93ks fuller and drifting in; Dhir pushes it off the inner half back to Hosein
87ks shortens the length; Dhir opens the bat face and carves it to cover-point

ball_event: out Bowled!! Cleaned up! What an inspired move to bring Hosein on as the impact sub. He has turned the game around in Chennai Super Kings' favour. Dhir can't believe and looks at the pitch before starting his walk back. 90.6ks touch slower
event_info: the length is held back; the ball drifts in and Dhir thinks he can loft it down the ground; but the ball straightens to beat the outside-edge and hit the top of middle-stump. There is help for the spinners and Hosein is taking full advantage of it. Naman Dhir b Akeal Hosein 0(3)
88.6ks tossed up around off; Tilak prods forward and defends to the off-side
shortens the length and gets it to drift across; Tilak was shaping to pull but adjusts and pats it to mid-wicket
wicket-maiden! This is turning into an excellent start for Chennai Super Kings. Flighted outside off; Tilak presses across and blocks it to the off-side
fullish delivery on off; Suryakumar eases it down the ground and mid-off tidies up
nips back in from good length; Tilak is rooted to the crease; gets beaten on the inside-edge and is struck on the thigh pad
full delivery on off; Tilak squeezes it off the outer half through backward point
fuller and angled across; Suryakumar toe-ends the drive to cover
short and outside off; Suryakumar opens the bat face and almost guides the cut past backward point. He was relying more on timing than power to get the boundary
125.9ks pace off and angled across; Suryakumar goes hard on the drive and mistimes it to cover
full and angled across; Tilak leans forward and drives in front of square; sweeper keeps it to a single
130.1ks back of a length delivery; Suryakumar tucks it off the hips to deep square leg
not where he intended but Tilak will take that four. He charges down and reaches for the full delivery; throws his bat on the big shot and gets a thick outside-edge that flies over short third
131.7ks fuller and around off; Tilak defends in front of mid-off and quickly crosses over
good length ball close to off; Suryakumar knocks it back to Kamboj

direct hit might have had Suryakumar in trouble. He presents the full face of the bat and drives it straight back at Kamboj; who collects cleanly and has a shy at the stumps. Suryakumar quickly turns around and dives in. Luckily the throw was not on target
137.9ks fraction short and outside off; Tilak carves it to deep backward point
122ks slower ball angled outside off; Suryakumar reaches and mistimes the drive to extra cover
122.5ks pace off delivery; Suryakumar punches it square and picks out deep point
140.5ks fullish delivery around off; Tilak defends it back to Choudhary
short of length delivery; Tilak rides the bounce and blocks it to the off-side
sprays it outside off; Tilak thought about the slash but let it go; wide signalled
another one which is way outside off; Tilak leaves at the last second and picks up the wide
142.9ks very full delivery; Tilak jams it to mid-off and Suryakumar has to hurry. There's a direct hit at the striker's end but Suryakumar had made it in
130.6ks back of a length close to off; Tilak guides it to backward point
short of length around off; Tilak stands tall and directs it to sweeper cover
134.6ks back of a length delivery; Suryakumar knocks it to mid-wicket

ouch! Suryakumar tries to break the shackles and is struck on the mid-riff. He moves across and attempts the pick-up shot; misses and is struck on the abdomen. He throws his bat down and walks away to take a breather
133.2ks good length ball on off; Suryakumar pushes it on the rise and picks out cover

he's got hit again. 134.6ks good length ball angled in; Suryakumar plants his front foto across and attempts the lap. He misses and is struck on the box. Kamboj gestures to Samson that it bounced and hence no appeal for LBW

shot! Fourth over for Choudhary and he goes for a boundary first ball. Fraction short and enough width on offer; Tilak opens the bat face and cuts it behind square on the off-side. No chance for third man to stop that
back of a length around off; Tilak stands tall and punches to sweeper cover
that should get him going. Angled across; width on offer and Suryakumar cashes in; he square drives through point and beats the sweeper in the deep

fabulous shot! That's Suryakumar at his best. Back of a length delivery; slanted across Suryakumar; he transfers his weight back and punches it in front of square. This was all about timing and placement..
slower bouncer; but too short and too high; Suryakumar ducks and evades. Called wide for height
126.2ks slower ball outside off; Suryakumar drives square of the wicket
143ks good length ball skids in; Tilak is rooted to the crease and ekes out an inside-edge onto the pad
that's a horrible start from Noor. Attempts a googly and sprays it way down leg; no chance for Samson behind the stumps who even dives across. Luckily short fine fielder is able to cut it off
94.3ks flighted outside off; Suryakumar drives sans timing and picks out extra cover
93.5ks drifted across the right-hander; Suryakumar drives to long-off
googly that turns in; Tilak nudges it through the vacant mid-wicket pocket
93.9ks flatter delivery; Suryakumar punches it to long-off
flighted outside off; Tilak sits down to slog sweep and drags it off the inner half to backward square leg
boundary to end the over. Googly around off; Suryakumar makes room and drives it straight down the ground. He evades Noor's outstretched left leg and the two fielders getting across in the deep
back to back fours. 141.5ks fraction short and angled across; Tilak does not try to overhit the cut shot; opens the bat face and carves it past backward point
123.6ks short of length around the hips; Tilak tucks it backward of square and races back for the second

runs starting to flow.. Good length ball angled across; there was width on offer and Tilak capitalises; he opens his arms and lofts it over extra cover. Mid-off was inside the ring and it was a safe shot
good length ball on off; Tilak stabs it to the off-side and crosses over
140.7ks short of length around off; Suryakumar drops it into the off-side and switches ends
120.1ks slower ball on leg; Tilak nudges it through mid-wicket and calls for two; but Suryakumar says no
quicker one around off; Tilak Varma steers it towards backward point for a single
Noor Ahmad goes full and Suryakumar Yadav drills this straight back to the bowler
fired down the leg-side; Suryakumar Yadav goes for paddle sweep; flicks his glove and rolls towards short fine leg
advances down the wicket and thumps this over the infield at covers for a much needed boundary
takes on the bowler; lofts this towards long-on for a single
flatter through the air on leg; Suryakumar Yadav flicks it over mid-wicket for a couple of runs
tad short outside off; Tilak Varma cuts it through the off-side for one
fired on leg; Suryakumar Yadav flicks it towards wide long-on for a couple of runs
shimmies down the wicket and lofts this over the infield at covers for a couple of runs
goes down on his knee and sweeps this towards short fine leg

ball_event: out Bowled!! Third wicket for Akeal Hosein. Full and straight outside off
event_info: Tilak Varma swings across the line; loses his shape and the inside edge smashes into the stumps. Got a century in the previous match; but departs after playing a rusty knock tonight. Nothing much he could have done with Akeal Hosein on song. He has bowled a top-notch spell in this match. MI sink further in trouble as the required run rate has gone past the 15-run mark. Tilak Varma b Akeal Hosein 37(29) [4s-5]
tad short outside off; steered through the off-side for one

ball_event: out Caught by Mukesh Choudhary!! Another one bites the dust. Hardik Pandya's poor run with the bat in the tournament continues. A tossed up delivery by the left-arm legspinner and Hardik Pandya looks to take him on. Plays a wild slog
event_info: completely loses his shape and the top edge has been taken by Mukesh at short third man. He moved to his left and took it easily. Mumbai Indians have lost half their side. Hardik Pandya c Mukesh Choudhary b Noor Ahmad 1(2)

ball_event: out Caught by Anshul Kamboj!! Noor Ahmad on a hat-trick. Sherfane Rutherford is gone without troubling the scorers
event_info: goes for a golden duck. This was full and wide outside off; Sherfane Rutherford reaches out for it and slices it towards deep point. Kamboj stationed there charges to his right and takes a good running catch. CSK inching closer to an emphatic win. Sherfane Rutherford c Anshul Kamboj b Noor Ahmad 0(1)
Shardul Thakur defends this towards the off-side
full and straight outside off; Shardul Thakur goes for a drive and gets beaten on the outside edge. Guess it spun away slightly
1 run; Shardul Thakur goes for a sweep; the ball flicks his pads and rolls towards the on-side
driven to long-off for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Sarfaraz Khan!! Four wickets for Akeal Hosein. Suryakumar Yadav goes for a sweep and the top edge flies straight to deep backward square leg. Sarfaraz Khan completes the formalities and the Mumbai supporters look absolutely disappointed. Has been a pretty embarrassing performance by the five-time IPL champions at their home ground. A match-defining spell from Akeal this has been.. Suryakumar Yadav c Sarfaraz Khan b Akeal Hosein 36(30) [4s-5]
event_info: out Caught by Sarfaraz Khan!! Four wickets for Akeal Hosein. Suryakumar Yadav goes for a sweep and the top edge flies straight to deep backward square leg. Sarfaraz Khan completes the formalities and the Mumbai supporters look absolutely disappointed. Has been a pretty embarrassing performance by the five-time IPL champions at their home ground. A match-defining spell from Akeal this has been.. Suryakumar Yadav c Sarfaraz Khan b Akeal Hosein 36(30) [4s-5]
tossed up delivery around off; knocked back to the bowler
flatter through the air on leg; Krish Bhagat works it away for a single
tossed up delivery around off; Shardul Thakur drives it to long-off for one
